title: Endercraft 0.15.0
description: In this mod adds a whole ton of features such as: armor, items, food, biome, wood type, dimension, crafting recipe for stuff, advancement, ore, and tones more to come!
body:
THIS MOD WAS CREATED BY GAMERMC3454

In this mod adds a whole ton of features such as, armor, items, food, biome, wood type, dimention, crafting recipe for stuff, advancement, ore, and tonnes more to come!

**(MOD IS NO LONGER BEING UPDATED)
Endercraft, was a experiment, that i never expected to get big, i didn't even try on it lmao.
If you want more content, goto my [Linktree - gamermc3454](https://linktr.ee/gamermc3454), thanks! (or goto my profile for my other mod, Epic Arsenal)**
 
ITEMS:
Enderman Armor: Stronger than Netherite, more knockback resistance, easier to not be knocked off a cliff at times, has more durability.
Enderman Tools: stronger and better than netherite again, does more damage and has more durability.
Enderwood, spawns in the Biome, Enderland (the trees leaves have a automatic decaying problem, im trying to fix it.)
Endercity, the new dimension of this mod, spawns Enderman and Endermite, and the new entity, Player / Steve!
Enderslash Enchantment, Not working at this current moment, but it is meant to be a sword buff.
Enderfruit, the new food of this mod, gives alot of Saturation and hunger bars 
Onions, (bc why not?)
Trampoline / Jump Pads, lets you jump 1.5, 2, 3, 4 or 5 times as high!
gamer set, adds gamerore, gameringot, gamersword and the gamerhelmet!
gamer painting and gamer particles
Ender-Emeralds
New Villager trades and profession (wandering trader has been updated) and added the Enderist!
Reverse water, pulls insteads of pushes!
MORE TO COME!!!


MOD VERSION:

0.15 BETA TEST

--------------------

 

VERSIONS THIS MOD SUPPORTS:

1.19.4
